title: Noise expected at George Library due to installation of an inverter
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Library is in the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George Library is in the process of installing an inverter.


> The library management would like to apologise for any inconvenience to the public beforehand as there will be some noise experienced from Friday, 19 April to Tuesday, 23 April.


While the units are installed the contractors will need to drill holes which will cause a certain amount of noise.

There will also be electrical downtime during this period which will be communicated closer to the time.

For any queries, please contact George Library on 044 801 9288.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
